name: UserTesting
description: UserTesting — User research platform for recruiting participants and conducting moderated and unmoderated tests.

seo.title: UserTesting — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: UserTesting: UserTesting — User research platform for recruiting participants and conducting moderated and unmoderated tests.

when_to_use: Unmoderated usability test for product design validation
Recruit and run user research panel for UX team
Moderated session for prototype feedback before launch
Competitive UX benchmarking with participant panels
Video session analysis for product decision-making

pros: Large panel for fast participant recruiting
Moderated and unmoderated studies in one place
Video responses reveal real usability issues
cons: Expensive for startups and small teams
Not a product analytics tool; qualitative only
Merger with UserZoom created some overlap
Panel quality varies by target audience
review.verdict: Still the strongest qualitative user research panel at scale; budget and qualitative-only by design.
review.best_for: Product and UX teams running frequent moderated or unmoderated studies with real users.
review.not_for: Startups on tight budgets or teams needing quantitative product analytics.
